pageContext.name: Iron Man (Foil Edition)
pageContext.description: 'There is nothing except this. There's no art opening, no charity, nothing to sign. There's the next mission, and nothing else.'  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Iron Man (Foil Edition) Fine Art Screen Print!  This visually stunning Iron Man (2008) tribute by Chris Thornley (Raid71) features a colorful blueprint of what makes Iron Man tick! Presented on Holo-Foil paper, this screen print is hand-numbered and printed by Vahalla Studios.  Limited to 225 pieces, be sure to add this awesome Iron Man art print to your Marvel art collection today!
